sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports discomfort with scars. He was using scar gel for the past month and discontinued it last week. He states the scars are itchy and slightly painful.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Exam reveals several scars on the lower legs, ranging in size from small to moderate. Skin is intact and without signs of infection. Vital signs are stable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's primary concern is the appearance and discomfort of his scars. There is no evidence of infection or other acute complications.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends revisiting the scars in six months. The patient can keep using mederma scar gel twice a day. The patient can put scar gel on other scars. The doctor will take pictures of the scars today.
